parsed.production_notes: The video consists of live-action vlog-style footage, smartphone screen recordings, and natural voiceovers. Lighting and camera movements are typical of user-generated content.

characters.appearance: Young Asian woman with long dark hair. She has a fair complexion and soft facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Wears various casual outfits including a grey patterned beanie, a black top, and a fuzzy beige jacket.
characters.demeanor: Relatable, slightly awkward but earnest and encouraging.

scenes.setting: Various locations: car interior, home desk, grocery store aisle.

panels.panel_visual_description: A montage of quick clips. First, a woman sits in the passenger seat of a car, looking nervous. Next, a hand holds a smartphone displaying a map application. Then, a close-up of a smartphone on a desk on speakerphone. Finally, a hand holds a box of nonfat dry milk in a grocery store aisle.

scenes.visual_description: A fast-paced montage showing the vlogger in different everyday situations in the US, highlighting her struggles with English. The clips include her in a car, using a phone, and shopping for groceries.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: No, some like Mediterranean...
Unknown speaker says: Yeah, you go very good.
Character A says: Can I get a make a reservation for my nail...
Character A says: Dry milk powder?
scenes.on_screen_text:
pov: 앱으로만 영어 공부하고 미국 온 사람 현실
1일차
(현실 사람이 말 걸면 긴장함...)
어쩌저찌 맛집 추천받음
5일차
전화로 네일샵 예약하는 건 식은죽먹기
표현지인에게 익ㅋ숙ㅋ
10일차
이쯤되니 용기 생겨버림
어려운 물건 (탈지분유?)도 쇼핑가능

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits in a restaurant, holding a metal plate with a partially eaten burger and pickles. She wears a grey patterned beanie and a dark top. She looks directly at the camera, speaking with a slightly self-deprecating smile. The background shows blurred restaurant interiors and other patrons.

scenes.visual_description: Character A speaks directly to the camera while holding a plate of food in a restaurant. Brief inset clips show someone riding a bike on a path and Character A taking a mirror selfie in an elevator.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 솔직히 저 딱 봐도 영어 잘 못 하잖아요? [Honestly, just by looking at me, you can tell I'm not good at English, right?]
Character A says: 근데 이걸 인정하기까지 되게 오래 걸렸거든요? [But it took me a really long time to admit this.]
Character A says: 자전거도 몇 번 넘어져야 잘 타게 되고 회사 일도 경험을 해야 렙업이 되는 건데 [You have to fall off a bike a few times to ride it well, and you have to experience work to level up,]
Character A says: 영어는 왜 이렇게 틀리는 게 무서웠는지 모르겠어요. [I don't know why I was so afraid of making mistakes in English.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
*할인링크 있음*
솔직히 저 딱 봐도
영어 잘 못 하잖아요?
근데 이걸 인정하기까지
되게 오래 걸렸거든요?
자전거도 몇 번 넘어져야
회사 일도
경험을 해야
영어는 왜 이렇게
틀리는 게 무서웠는지

scenes.setting: Airport terminal and a coffee shop.

panels.panel_visual_description: A wide shot of a bright airport terminal with large windows and people walking with luggage. This cuts to an over-the-shoulder shot of Character A standing at a coffee shop counter, interacting with a barista. She is wearing a black leather jacket and carrying a backpack.

scenes.visual_description: The scene transitions from a wide shot of an airport to Character A ordering at a coffee shop. An inset image briefly shows an advertisement for the Speak app featuring a male model.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 저는 이전에도 말했다시피 요즘 스픽으로 공부 중인데 [As I said before, I'm studying with Speak these days,]
Character A says: 제일 많이 바뀐 건 현지인이랑 소통할 때 틀려도 부끄럽지 않다는 거! [The biggest change is that I'm not embarrassed even if I make a mistake when communicating with locals!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
*할인링크 있음*
이전에도 말했다시피
영어, 올해는 트일 것이다
요즘 스픽으로
영어공부 중인데
제일 많이 바뀐 건
현지인이랑 소통할 때
틀려도 부끄럽지 않음!
(이 철학 때문에 스픽을 선택한 거기도 함!)

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up of a smartphone being held by two hands. The screen displays a language learning application interface with various 3D animated avatars and conversational scenarios. The user's thumbs tap and scroll through the app's menus, selecting different options and typing on the virtual keyboard.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of the Speak app being used on a smartphone. The user navigates through the 'Community Topics' and 'Roleplay' sections, demonstrating the 'Free Talk Visual Mode' with AI avatars.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 그래도 저처럼 내향적인 분들은 [Still, for introverted people like me,]
Character A says: '프리톡 비주얼모드'로 진짜 외국인이랑 대화하는 것처럼 여러 상황을 미리 시뮬레이션 해보세요. [Try simulating various situations in advance as if you are really talking to a foreigner with 'Free Talk Visual Mode'.]
Character A says: 여행 가기 전에 선행학습으로 진짜 좋아요. [It's really good for prior learning before going on a trip.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
*할인링크 있음*
그래도 저처럼
내향적인 분들은
'프리톡 비주얼모드'로
진짜 외국인이랑 대화하는 것처럼
여러 상황을
미리 시뮬레이션 해보세요
여행 가기 전에
선행학습으로도 굿!

panels.panel_visual_description: A first-person view looking down at a person's legs walking across a wooden floor, pulling a rolling suitcase. The view then pans up to reveal a cozy living room with a patterned rug, a large potted plant, and a lit Christmas tree in the corner.

scenes.visual_description: A POV shot of arriving home with a suitcase, panning up to show a living room decorated for the holidays. An inset image briefly shows an Instagram profile page.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 스픽 할인권 받고 싶은 분들은 프로필 링크에 올려놨으니 [For those who want to get a Speak discount coupon, I've put it on my profile link,]
Character A says: 새해 가기 전에 같이 영어공부 해봐요! [Let's study English together before the new year!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
전용 할인링크 받는 법
받고 싶은 분들은
프로필 링크에 올려놨으니
새해 가기 전에
같이 영어공부 해요!
2024
